# doit_support_request_comments (Data Source)

Create and manage support tickets with DoiT.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all comments on a support request
data "doit_support_request_comments" "example" {
  ticket_id = 12345
}

output "comment_count" {
  value = length(data.doit_support_request_comments.example.comments)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ticket_id` (Number) The unique identifier of the support request.

### Read-Only

- `comments` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--comments))

<a id="nestedatt--comments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `comments`

Read-Only:

- `attachments` (Attributes List) File attachments on the comment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--comments--attachments))
- `author` (String) Email address of the comment author.
- `body` (String) The text content of the comment.
- `created` (Number) The time when this comment was created, in milliseconds since the epoch.
- `id` (Number) Comment ID.

<a id="nestedatt--comments--attachments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `comments.attachments`

Read-Only:

- `content_url` (String)
- `file_name` (String)
- `id` (Number)
